channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Prudentópolis, Brazil: A Ukrainian Diaspora Community Preserving Its Heritage
item.description: Prudentópolis, a municipality in the southern Brazilian state of Paraná, is widely known as one of the most concentrated Ukrainian diaspora communities outside Eastern Europe. The article describes ho...

item.title: International aid arrives in Venezuela as earthquake death toll surpasses 1,400
item.description: International humanitarian assistance has begun arriving in Venezuela following a devastating earthquake that has left widespread destruction and a rapidly rising death toll. According to reports, the...

item.title: Steam Summer Sale brings major discounts to over 800 VR and VR-compatible games
item.description: The article reports on the launch of Steam’s annual Summer Sale, which includes significant discounts across a large selection of virtual reality (VR) games and VR-compatible titles. The promotion run...

item.title: Amazon Prime Day deals continue after the event with 64 discounted products still available
item.description: CNN Underscored reports that although Amazon Prime Day has officially ended, a wide selection of discounts remains available for shoppers. The article highlights that editors and deals experts have id...

item.title: Rep. Mike Lawler opposes proposed F-35 sale to Turkey over national security concerns
item.description: Rep. Mike Lawler, a Republican from New York, publicly broke with the Trump administration over a proposed plan to sell advanced F-35 fighter jets to Turkey. In a statement shared on social media, Law...

item.title: From Shadow to Legacy: A Pastor’s Son Reflects on His Father’s Influence
item.description: The article is a personal reflection by Immanuel Etcubañez about growing up as the son of a respected pastor and doctor, and how that shaped his sense of identity. Known in different circles as the so...

item.title: The 1957 Bentley S1 Continental Fastback Sports Saloon, a Classic Example of British Coachbuilt Luxury

item.title: Journalist Questions Trump's Reported Height After Comparing Him With John Thune

item.title: Algeria and Austria face renewed attention over 1982 Gijón controversy ahead of 2026 World Cup group decider
item.description: The article examines how the 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage matchup between Algeria and Austria has taken on symbolic weight due to historical tensions dating back to the 1982 World Cup. In that tour...

item.title: England defeat Panama to reclaim top spot in Group L as Croatia edge ahead of Ghana at the 2026 FIFA World Cup

item.title: Sen. Chris Murphy Criticizes JD Vance's Remarks on Watergate and Executive Power
